name: Slitheran
treasure: The slitheran are a race of serpent men with two arms, but have no legs but instead slither around. This means that they cannot wear any type of boots or leggings. Their scales are usually golden to dull-yellow in color and they have fangs that will inject a venom once a day on whoever they successfully bite. This bite must be declared during that combat round, before dice are rolled, and the slitheran`s side must win that combat round for the bite to take effect. This venom will decrease the victim`s combat adds (at the rate of the slitheran`s level x 5).

creator: TT
description: Pixies always gain the surprise. They will use their special ability if they DICE. Roll 1 die to determine the ability. A roll of 1-3 means their sleeping toxin on their weapon hits someone. This toxin will make the victim fall asleep for HURT combat rounds unless they can make a SAVE vs. CON. If there are no more awake opponents, the pixie will steal all of the possessions of the victim(s). On a roll of 4-6, they will turn invisible. This happens before the start of the next combat round and will let the sprite get a free attack as though it got the surprise. The invisibility only lasts for one combat round, which they will reappear.

They can roam the land with others but must submerge themselves in water at least once a week to keep their scales from hurting.

name: Imp

name: Hydra
location: PP PS PF PM CP CF CM TS TF TM DG
creator: TT
description: This dragon-looking creature has 6 heads, each with its own breath weapon. If they DICE, one of the heads will use their breath weapon. To determine which head, roll 1 die (1-Frost:Character is frozen for HURT combat rounds; 2-Fire:Character suffers HURT points of damage; 3-Electricity:Character misses the next combat round from the shock; 4-Acid:Character suffers HURT points of damage and also loses a single piece of random equipped armor or weapon; 5-Tar:Characters miss combat rounds until they can make a SAVE vs. STR to free themselves from the sticky substance; 6-Oil:Characters must make a SAVE vs. DEX before every combat round or slip and fall down). This breath will affect everyone in front of the hydra unless the targets can make a SAVE vs. LCK or SPD. This attack damage is in addition to any other damage during that round.

name: Hulking Beast

They have bright yellow eyes and if they DICE, an opponent will stare into them and become confused unless they can make a SAVE vs. INT. This confusion will cause the victim to stop fighting and wander aimlessly for HURT combat rounds. Each target that gets damaged from the attack rolls 1 die to determine which one is confused, where the lowest number suffers from the effects.

Each combat round, they can attempt a SAVE vs. STR to try and free themselves. While inside, they will take HURT points of damage each combat round until they either free themselves or become fully digested and die.

name: Unicorn
creator: TT
description: These magical horses will turn invisible if they DICE. This happens before the start of the next combat round and will let the unicorn get a free attack as though it got the surprise. The invisibility only lasts for one combat round, which they will reappear. Anyone to seize a unicorn horn can use it as a magical athame (dagger) with Dice + Adds of 3+4.

name: Vampire
location: CF CH CM CP DG PD PF PH PM PP PS TF TH TM TS
creator: TT
description: These creatures of darkness will absorb any damage given to opponents and heal themselves (but not over their maximum MR). Anyone holding garlic may double the amount of combat dice they use against it. If holy water is thrown on the vampire, everyone attacking it may double the combat dice used. Sunlight turns them to dust and will often try and turn into a bat and flee if they are close to death. They can only be harmed by magical weapons. Spells do not harm them unless they are of a fiery nature. They will also flee from holy symbols and may only use half of their dice if in the presence of such a symbol. They can be instantly killed if something wooden is driven into their hearts or they are exposed to sunlight.

name: Fairy
treasure: Fairies are very small humanoids with insect like wings that live in the forests of the world. They can emit a small amount of light varying in colors from blue, white, green, or yellow. This light can help when in the darkest of underground areas, but only up to about 6 feet. This light can also confuse an opponent for a number of combat rounds equal to their level (per day) if they can make an L1SR vs. INT. The fairy must also have a WIZ higher than the opponent. This confusion causes the opponent to use only half of their dice (rounded up) during the next combat round._Fairies are very small humanoids with insect like wings that live in the forests of the world. They can emit a small amount of light varying in colors from blue, white, green, or yellow. This light can help when in the darkest of underground areas, but only up to about 6 feet. This light can also confuse an opponent for a number of combat rounds equal to their level (per day) if they can make an L1SR vs. INT. The fairy must also have an INT higher than the opponent. This confusion causes the opponent to use only half of their dice (rounded up) during the next combat round.
loot: STR: 0.25 / CON: 0.25 / DEX: 2 / INT: 1 / LCK: 2 / CHR: 1 / WIZ: 2 / HGT: 0.165 / WGT: 0.1
creator: TT
description: Fairies are very small humanoids with insect like wings that live in the forests of the world. They sometimes emit a small amount of light varying in colors from blue, white, green, or yellow. They will unleash a polymorph spell if they DICE. This magic will take one of 6 forms on a single opponent. Each target that gets damaged from the attack rolls 1 die to determine which one is affected, where the lowest number suffers from the effects. To determine which form the victim takes, roll 1 die (1-Frog; 2-Pig; 3-Sheep; 4-Chicken; 5-Dog; 6-Cat). A SAVE vs. LCK can be made to avoid the effects. In this form, the victim cannot attack while they are in this form for the next HURT combat rounds.

name: Tigran
location: CF CH DG PF PH PS TF TH TS
treasure: Tigran are a race of humanoid cats that vary in fur color and appearance. Some look like panthers, while others look like tigers. Others might look like a cheetah, and some might have a leopard appearance. They live in the forests of the world and hunt with great stealth. They make their homes from wood of the surrounding forest, with beautiful architecture. Since they can move very quietly, this gives them the extra DEX talent of `sneak`. They have a tendency to become rogues and can see perfectly in non-magical darkness._Tigran are a race of humanoid cats that vary in fur color and appearance. Some look like panthers, while others look like tigers. Others might look like a cheetah, and some might have a leopard appearance. They live in the forests of the world and hunt with great stealth. They make their homes from wood of the surrounding forest, with beautiful architecture. Since they can move very quietly, they get a +6 to any SR roll when trying to sneak. They have a tendency to become rogues and can see perfectly in non-magical darkness.
loot: STR: 1 / CON: 0.67 / DEX: 2 / INT: 1 / LCK: 1.5 / CHR: 3 / WIZ: 1 / HGT: 1 / WGT: 0.67

name: Wulfan

treasure: Wulfan are a race of humanoid wolves that vary in fur color from white, gray, and varying shades of brown. There are rare wulfan that have black fur. They live in small villages called `packs` and they have a keen sense of smell. This gives them the extra INT talent of `tracking`. They often become hunters by profession and can see perfectly in non-magical darkness._Wulfan are a race of humanoid wolves that vary in fur color from white, gray, and varying shades of brown. There are rare wulfan that have black fur. They live in small villages called `packs` and they have a keen sense of smell. This gives them a +6 to any SR related to tracking. They often become hunters by profession and can see perfectly in non-magical darkness.

This roaring sound has varying effects to everyone unless the targets can make a save against fear. Roll 1 die to determine the effect of the roar (1-Soul is ripped from the body where resurrection is impossible; 2-Scared and runs away for 1d6 rounds; 3-Turns to a pile of ash and dies; 4-Paralyzed for 1d6 rounds; 5-Damaged for 1d6 points of damage; 6-Possessed where they attack comrades for 1d6 rounds). This effect is in addition to any damage during that round.

name: Dwurman

If they are moving around unnoticed, they will attempt to steal things from passing adventurers. Making an ability check for intelligence will allow one to catch a spriggan doing this.

They often make homes and businesses in cities and will often have tunnels leading to such places. Although their businesses might appear legitimate, they are often shady in their dealings...dabbling in crime and assassination. Their skin is often varying shades of black with white hair. Their bright white eyes allow them to see perfectly in non-magical darkness.

name: Nymph

creator: SX
description: Although friendly by nature, anyone attacking these beautiful female-looking creatures may suffer a horrible fate. They will undress if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). Anyone looking upon them naked will die unless they can make a save against mind effects.

name: Sylph
creator: SX
description: These beautiful pixie-like creatures will summon an air elemental if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect).

name: Dryad
creator: SX
description: This beautiful creature will attempt to charm their target if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). They will be charmed for 1d6 rounds unless they can make a save against mind effects. During this time, they will attack their comrades. A good blow to the head will snap them out of the charm effects.

name: Fairy
creator: SX
description: Fairies are very small humanoids with insect like wings that live in the forests of the world. They sometimes emit a small amount of light varying in colors from blue, white, green, or yellow. They will unleash a polymorph spell if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). This magic will take one of 6 forms on their target. To determine which form the victim takes, roll 1 die (1-Frog; 2-Pig; 3-Sheep; 4-Chicken; 5-Dog; 6-Cat). A save against magic can be made to avoid the effects. In this form, the victim cannot attack while they are in this form for the next 1d6 rounds.

name: Pixie
creator: SX
description: Pixies always gain the surprise. They will use their special ability if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). Roll 1 die to determine the ability. A roll of 1-3 means their sleeping toxin on their weapon affects their target. This toxin will make the victim fall asleep for 1d6 rounds unless they can make a save against poison. If there are no more awake opponents, the pixie will steal all of the possessions of the victim(s). On a roll of 4-6, they will turn invisible. This happens before the start of the next round and will let the sprite get a free attack as though it got the surprise. The invisibility only lasts for one round, which they will reappear.

name: Satyr
creator: SX
description: If they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect), the satyr will play a song on their musical pipes. To determine which song, roll 1 die (1-Confusion:Characters attack each other; 2-Sleep:Characters pass out for 1d6 rounds; 3-Soothing:Characters stop fighting for 1d6 rounds; 4-Fear:Characters run away in terror for 1d6 rounds; 5-Relax:Characters begin to remove all equipment and clothing, dropping it to the ground where they will miss the next round picking it all up; 6-Sadness:Characters begin to cry for 1d6 rounds where the tears cause -1 to their combat die rolls). This song will affect everyone near the satyr unless they can make a save against magic.

name: Sprite
creator: SX
description: They will use their special ability if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). Roll 1 die to determine the ability. A roll of 1-3 means their sleeping toxin on their weapon hits someone. This toxin will make the victim fall asleep for HURT rounds unless they can make a save against poison. If there are no more awake opponents, the sprite will steal all of the possessions of the victim(s). On a roll of 4-6, they will turn invisible. This happens before the start of the next round and will let the sprite get a free attack as though it got the surprise. The invisibility only lasts for one round, which they will reappear.

name: Leprechaun
creator: SX
description: Spells do not work against these creatures unless the caster has an intelligence score over 5. They will create an illusion of themselves if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). Opponents will attack this illusion during the next round unless they can make a save against illusions. This illusion will disappear after the next round. If captured, there is a 50% chance (1-3 rolling 1 die) that they will tell the location of their treasure.

name: Afanc

name: Lamprey, Giant
creator: SX

They will then begin to suck the blood of the victim unless they can make an ability check for strength to get it off. Anyone getting blood drained will suffer 2 points of damage per round. Anyone attacking this creature while attached will hurt the victim as well. The victim may attempt to make an ability check for strength each round to try and remove the creature. Any time this creature is attached to someone, it no longer attacks normally but continues to drain blood.

If one makes their SR for this poison, they are instead wrapped in a sticky web where they must reduce their combat dice by half (rounded up) until they can free themselves. Making an ability check for strength will accomplish this.

This poison will cause the victim to die unless they can make a save against poison. If one makes their SR for this poison, they are instead wrapped in a sticky web where they must reduce their combat dice by half (rounded up) until they can free themselves. name: Tigran
location: CF CH DG PF PH PS TF TH TS
creator: SX
description: Tigran are a race of humanoid cats that vary in fur color and appearance. Some look like panthers, while others look like tigers. Others might look like a cheetah, and some might have a leopard appearance. They generally live in forest regions and will surprise anyone if they roll a 1-3.

name: Tree, Dark Reaper
creator: SX
description: These walking trees are often passed unnoticed.

name: Tree, Hanging
location: PF PH PS TF TH TS
creator: SX
description: This tree attacks by slapping opponents with branches. It will attempt to strangle an opponent if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). This will cause the victim to suffocate in 2d6 rounds unless they can make an ability check for strength. Although the victim cannot attack while held, they can perform an ability check for strength each round to try and break free.

name: Tree, Reaper
location: CF CH CM CP PF PH PM PP PS TF TH TM TS
creator: SX
description: These walking trees are often passed unnoticed.

name: Talking Tree
creator: SX
description: These wise trees are often passed unnoticed. They are peaceful by nature and often give adventurers legends or rumors to send them on quest. They cannot move but they have the ability to launch magical balls of energy to do their damage. These orbs will have an additional effect if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). The target will turn into a tree forever unless they can make a save against magic. Any bows or crossbows made from the wood of this creature will have a +2 to attack rolls.

name: Troll
location: PD PP PS PF PH PM CP CF CH CM TS TF TH TM DG
creator: SX
description: These creatures regenerate 2 hit points every round unless they were attacked by some fire based spell or weapon.

name: Troll, Frost
creator: SX
description: These creatures regenerate 2 hit points every round unless they were attacked by some fire based spell or weapon. They are also immune to any cold based effects.

name: Troll, Ghostly
creator: SX
description: These creatures regenerate 2 hit points every round unless they were attacked by some fire based spell or weapon. They are also immune to any cold based effects. Only magical weapons or spells can hurt them, along with any fire based attacks.

name: Troll, Giant
location: CF CH CM CP DG PD PF PH PS TF TH TM TS
creator: SX
description: These creatures regenerate 2 hit points every round unless they were attacked by some fire based spell or weapon.

name: Troll, Giant, Two-Headed
location: CF CH CM CP DG PD PF PH PP PS TF TH TM TS
creator: SX
description: These creatures regenerate 2 hit points every round unless they were attacked by some fire based spell or weapon.

name: Troll, River
creator: SX
description: These creatures regenerate 2 hit points every round unless they were attacked by some fire based spell or weapon.

name: Troll, Sea
creator: SX
description: These creatures regenerate 2 hit points every round unless they were attacked by some fire based spell or weapon.

name: Apparition
creator: SX
description: This ghostly creature can only be attacked with magic or silver weapons. Spells will also work against it. They will use their fear aura if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). This will automatically cause targets to flee in terror unless they can make a save against mind effects. This fear lasts for 1d6 rounds. Anyone killed by this creature will rise and become one of them after an hour has passed.

name: Banshee
location: CF CH CP DG PD PF PH PP TF
creator: SX
description: This ghostly female creature can only be attacked with magic weapons. Spells will also work against it. They will use their deathly scream if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). This will automatically cause everyone to die unless they can make a save against mind effects.

name: Ghast
location: CH CM CP DG PH PM PP PS TH TM TS
creator: SX
description: They will paralyze a victim if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). This paralysis will last for 1d6 rounds unless they can make a save against paralyzation.

name: Ghost
location: CF CH CM CP DG PF PH PM PP PS TF TH TM TS
creator: SX
description: They will age a victim if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). The victim will age 2d6 years unless they can make a save against magic.

name: Ghoul
location: PP PS PH PM CP CF CH CM TS TH TM DG
creator: SX
description: They will paralyze a victim if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). This paralysis will last for 1d6 rounds unless they can make a save against paralyzation. Anyone killed by a ghoul will become one in about a day unless they are resurrected or the body destroyed.

name: Haunt
creator: SX
description: They will possess a victim if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). The victim will be in total control by the haunt unless they can make a save against fear. The only way to free the victim is to get them out of the area where the haunt resides, as the haunt cannot leave that area. Killing the victim will also unleash the haunt.

name: Mummy
location: CF CH CM CP DG PD PF PH PM PP PS TF TH TM TS
creator: SX
description: These creatures will emit an aura of fear if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect), causing targets to flee in terror unless they can make a save against fear. This fear lasts for 1d6 rounds. They can only be harmed by magical weapons or spells.

name: Phantom
creator: SX
description: These creatures will produce a scary illusion if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect), causing targets to flee in terror unless they can make a save against fear. This fear lasts for 1d6 rounds. They can only be harmed by magical weapons or spells.

name: Poltergeist
creator: SX
description: These undead spirits always stay in the same place and are always invisible. This causes anyone attacking them to suffer a -2 to their attack rolls. If the poltergeist were to roll a 6 during their attack roll, they will cause a target to flee in terror for 1d6 rounds unless they can make a save against fear.

name: Shade
location: CM CP DG PD PM PP PS TM TS
creator: SX
description: These creatures were once humanoids that were killed by the corruption of powerful dark magic. They now roam the world in a shadowy form that mimics their past form. They can only be harmed by magical weapons or spells.

name: Shadow
location: CF CM DG PF PM PS TF TM TS
creator: SX
description: These shadowy creatures can only be harmed by magical weapons or spells. They will drain a victim of 1 constitution point if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect).

name: Spectre
location: PS PH PM CF CM TS DG
creator: SX
description: These ghostly creatures can only be harmed by magical weapons or spells. They will drain a victim if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). The drain will reduce an attribute by 1 unless they can make a save against magic. The attribute drained is determined by rolling 1 die (1-STR; 2-DEX; 3-WIS; 4-INT; 5-CON; 6-CHA).

name: Wight
location: PS PM CF CM TS TM DG
creator: SX
description: These zombie creatures can only be harmed by magical weapons or spells. They will drain a victim if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). The drain will reduce an attribute by 1 unless they can make a save against magic. The attribute drained is determined by rolling 1 die (1-STR; 2-DEX; 3-WIS; 4-INT; 5-CON; 6-CHA).

name: Wraith
location: CM DG PM PS TM TS
creator: SX
description: These ghostly creatures can only be harmed by magical weapons or spells. They will drain a victim if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). The drain will reduce an attribute by 1 unless they can make a save against magic. The attribute drained is determined by rolling 1 die (1-STR; 2-DEX; 3-WIS; 4-INT; 5-CON; 6-CHA).

name: Dread Knight
creator: SX
description: These skeletal warriors will emit an aura of fear if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect), causing targets to flee in terror unless they can make a save against fear. This fear lasts for 1d6 rounds.

name: Revenant
creator: SX
description: These undead creatures are those that risen to seek revenge on those that killed them. They will often leave others alone unless attacked.

name: Tomb Watcher
creator: SX
description: These undead skeletal creatures where robes and are always found keeping a watchful eye on a tomb or crypt. They will use their teleportation magic if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). This magic will teleport the target about a mile away from the location unless they can save against magic.

name: Lich
creator: SX
description: Only magical weapons or spells can affect these undead wizards...which were once living wizards but their search for power and immortality brought them to this. They will unleash a magical spell if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). This magic will take one of 6 forms on a single opponent. To determine which spell, roll 1 die (1-Disintegrates and dies; 2-Scared and runs away for 1d6 rounds; 3-Turns to solid crystal and dies; 4-Sleep for 1d6 rounds; 5-Flamed for 1d6 points of damage; 6-Charms where they attack friends for 1d6 rounds). A save against magic can be made to avoid the effects.

name: Lich, Ancient
al: M6+ (double to triple the hp of an M6)
creator: SX
description: Only magical weapons or spells can affect these undead wizards...which were once living wizards but their search for power and immortality brought them to this. They will unleash a magical spell if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). This magic will take one of 6 forms on a single opponent. To determine which spell, roll 1 die (1-Disintegrates and dies; 2-Scared and runs away for 1d6 rounds; 3-Turns to solid crystal and dies; 4-Sleep for 1d6 rounds; 5-Flamed for 1d6 points of damage; 6-Charms where they attack friends for 1d6 rounds). A save against magic can be made to avoid the effects.

name: Skeletal Wizard
creator: SX
description: Only magical weapons or spells can affect these undead wizards...which were killed by their own magic causing them to roam the world in this fashion. They will unleash a magical spell if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). This magic will take one of 6 forms on a single opponent. To determine which spell, roll 1 die (1-Disintegrates and dies; 2-Scared and runs away for 1d6 rounds; 3-Turns to solid crystal and dies; 4-Sleep for 1d6 rounds; 5-Flamed for 1d6 points of damage; 6-Charms where they attack friends for 1d6 rounds). A save against magic can be made to avoid the effects.

location: CF CH CM CP PD PF PH PM PP PS

name: Weasel, Giant
location: PP PS PF PH PM CP CF CH CM
creator: SX

name: Vampire
location: CF CH CM CP DG PD PF PH PM PP PS TF TH TM TS
creator: SX
description: These creatures of darkness will absorb any damage given to opponents and heal themselves. Anyone holding garlic get a +2 to damage when fighting against it. If holy water is thrown on the vampire, everyone attacking it may double their damage dealt. Sunlight turns them to dust and will often try and turn into a bat and flee if they are close to death. They can only be harmed by magical weapons. Spells do not harm them unless they are of a fiery nature. They will also flee from holy symbols and suffer a -2 to attack rolls if in the presence of such a symbol. They can be instantly killed if something wooden is driven into their hearts or they are exposed to sunlight.

name: Will-O-Wisp
location: CM DG PM PS SW TM TS
creator: SX
description: These glowing creatures float around and only come out at night. From a distance it will always seem to look like a lantern being held. If they are not discovered as being wisps, they will attempt to lure adventurers to their death and then consume their souls. If this happens, they can never be resurrected.

name: Betrayer of Eyes
creator: SX
description: This large eye creature has 6 arms that are 5 feet in length and floats around with magic. Each arm has a 4 digit hand that holds an eye that will shoot a different beam of magical energy from each one. The eyes are able to be dropped. If they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect), one of the eyes will shoot this beam at a single target. To determine which eye, roll 1 die (1-Disintegrates and dies; 2-Scared and runs away for 1d6 rounds; 3-Turns to solid crystal and dies; 4-Sleep for 1d6 rounds; 5-Damaged for 1d6 points of damage; 6-Charms where they attack friends for 1d6 rounds). A save against magic can be made to avoid the effects.

name: Darkwater Eye
creator: SX
description: This large eye creature has 4 tentacles and a large mouth. Each tentacle has an eye that will shoot a different beam of magical energy from each one. The large eye has its own magical beam, while the mouth can emit a sonic burst of magical effect. If they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect), one of the magical abilities will affect a single target. To determine which ability, roll 1 die (1-Large Eye:Disintegrates and dies; 2-Sonic:Scared and runs away for 1d6 rounds; 3-Small Eye:Turns to solid crystal and dies; 4-Small Eye:Sleep for 1d6 rounds; 5-Small Eye:Damaged for 1d6 points of damage; 6-Small Eye:Charms where they attack friends for 1d6 rounds). A save against magic can be made to avoid the effects.

name: Water Being
creator: SX
description: This watery creature will unleash a wave of water if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). This wave will cause the victims to drown and die unless they can make a save against death.

name: Wulfan
location: CF CH DG PF PH PS TF TH TS
creator: SX
description: Wulfan are a race of humanoid wolves that vary in fur color from white, gray, and varying shades of brown. There are rare wulfan that have black fur. They live in small villages called `packs` and can track others with their keen sense of smell.

name: Zaren
location: CH CM DG PH PM TH TM
creator: SX
description: These egg-shaped creatures are immune to all spells and can only be harmed by magical weapons. They have colorful scales and one huge eye and an even larger mouth. They magically float around and have two powerful arms. They will eat an opponent`s gems if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). Their arms will quickly grab 1d6+2 gems from their target and consume it as it is part of their diet. This attack is in addition to any other damage during that round.

name: Zorn
location: CH CM DG PH PM TH TM
creator: SX
description: These egg-shaped creatures are immune to all spells and can only be harmed by magical weapons. They have golden scales and one huge eye and an even larger mouth. They magically float around and have two powerful arms. They will eat an opponent`s gold if they rolled a 6 with their attack roll (which is an additional attack effect). Their arms will quickly grab 1d6x10 gold from their target and consume it as it is part of their diet. This attack is in addition to any other damage during that round.
